description: wdrozenia bazy relacyjnej #3 w projekcie - wykonaj zadanie umieszczone w pliku jira3.md
title: wdrozenia bazy relacyjnej #3 w projekcie - wykonaj zadanie umieszczone w pliku jira3.md

criteria.description: File `script/migrate_to_db.ts` exists and contains a top-level `await` ESM script with dynamic imports for `../server/db.ts` after loading `.env` synchronously.
criteria.how_to_verify: Read `script/migrate_to_db.ts` — confirm `fs.readFileSync('.env')` appears before any `await import('../server/db')`.

criteria.description: Migration script inserts users with `onConflictDoNothing()` using original UUIDs from `data/users.json`, preserving `passwordHash` and `createdAt`.
criteria.how_to_verify: Search `script/migrate_to_db.ts` for `onConflictDoNothing` and verify `users` insert maps `id`, `username`, `passwordHash`, `createdAt` fields directly.

criteria.description: Migration script reads `data/project-states/{id}.json` for each project and includes it as the `state` field in the `projects` insert.
criteria.how_to_verify: In `script/migrate_to_db.ts`, find the projects loop — confirm `readFileSync(path.join(statesDir, project.id + '.json'))` is called and its parsed result is passed as `state` to `db.insert(projects)`.

criteria.description: Migration script inserts rows into `project_shares` for every element in the `sharedWith` array of each project.
criteria.how_to_verify: In `script/migrate_to_db.ts`, find `db.insert(projectShares)` call — it must map `sharedWith` array to `{ projectId, userId }` objects.

criteria.description: Files with a `projectId` in meta.json are assigned `storagePath` of `storage/projects/{projectId}/{fileId}`; files without `projectId` get `storage/users/{ownerId}/icons/{fileId}`.
criteria.how_to_verify: Read `script/migrate_to_db.ts` — confirm the conditional path logic: `meta.projectId ? path.join(storageRoot, 'projects', meta.projectId, meta.id) : path.join(storageRoot, 'users', meta.ownerId, 'icons', meta.id)`.

criteria.description: `DatabaseStorage.saveFile()` computes target directory based on `projectId` presence: `storage/projects/{projectId}/{id}` or `storage/users/{ownerId}/icons/{id}`.
criteria.how_to_verify: Read `server/databaseStorage.ts` lines for `saveFile()` — confirm `projectId ? path.join(storageRoot, 'projects', projectId) : path.join(storageRoot, 'users', ownerId, 'icons')` and `fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true })`.

criteria.description: Script prints a validation summary with counts of users, projects, project_shares, and files inserted vs. source record counts.
criteria.how_to_verify: Read `script/migrate_to_db.ts` — confirm `console.log` calls report both the number of source records read and the result of `db.select({ count: count() })` from each table.

criteria.description: `package.json` contains a `db:migrate` script entry that runs the migration via `tsx`.
criteria.how_to_verify: Read `package.json` `scripts` section — confirm `"db:migrate": "tsx script/migrate_to_db.ts"` is present.
